name: Mardi Gras Meringue Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk 4 egg whites at room temperature with 1/2 teaspoon of cream of tartar until foamy.
2. Gradually add 8 tablespoons of granulated sugar, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form.
3. Mix in 1/2 teaspoon of rum extract and 1/4 cup chopped pecans.
4. Spread the meringue mixture evenly over 8 crepes.
5. In a separate bowl, mix together 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, 2 tablespoons water, and 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger until well combined.
6. Add 8 ounces of sliced, frozen peaches to the mixture and stir gently.
7. Fold the peach mixture into the meringue-covered crepes.
8. Place the assembled crepe bundles in a preheated oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
